summary: NavigationView.tsx refactor verification complete. All 4 extracted components exist and are properly imported. Fixed a bug where maneuverIndex was undefined (local variable used outside scope). Backend API tests: 13/13 passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly with Google Sign In button visible. No React errors in console (only expected geolocation error in headless browser).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: maneuverIndex was a local variable inside updateNavigationState() but was being passed to RouteStepsModal component. Added state variable currentManeuverIndex and setCurrentManeuverIndex to fix this.
